title: Caves Delight
description: Farmers Delight addon for Alexs Caves
body:
Farmers Delight addon for Alexs Caves

Contains new food from all caves in alexacaves 

This addon aims to be fully thematic:

- Recipes match the cave ecosystem they come from
- Ingredients make sense with the mod’s lore
- Meals range from survival staples to exotic luxury foods
- Visuals, names, and mechanics are all tailored to the tone of Alex’s Caves
